description: Migration from v5 Venmo funding source to v6 Venmo payment session

v5_pattern.api_communication: Direct browser-to-PayPal API calls with Venmo funding

fundingSource.migration: Replace funding source parameter with dedicated Venmo session
fundingSource.breaking_change: Must use separate session type for Venmo

style.migration: Move from JavaScript config to CSS classes

eligibility.migration: Always check eligibility before creating Venmo session

device_requirements.mobile: Venmo app must be installed for mobile payments
device_requirements.desktop: Venmo account required for web payments
device_requirements.fallback: Always provide PayPal as alternative payment method

same_as_paypal.note: Venmo uses same server endpoints as PayPal payments

auto.description: Automatically choose best presentation for Venmo
auto.mobile_behavior: Opens Venmo app if installed, otherwise web flow

popup.limitation: May be blocked by popup blockers

migration_steps.code: const eligible = await sdkInstance.findEligibleMethods({ currencyCode: 'USD', countryCode: 'US' });

migration_steps.action: Add click handler with auto presentation

venmo_button.styling: Use standard CSS for Venmo brand colors
venmo_button.visibility: Show only after eligibility check passes

VENMO_NOT_AVAILABLE.description: Venmo not available in customer's region
VENMO_NOT_AVAILABLE.user_message: Venmo is not available in your region. Please use PayPal.

VENMO_APP_NOT_INSTALLED.description: Venmo app not installed on mobile device
VENMO_APP_NOT_INSTALLED.user_message: Please install the Venmo app or use PayPal.
VENMO_APP_NOT_INSTALLED.fallback_action: Provide app store link and PayPal option

VENMO_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED.user_message: A Venmo account is required. Please use PayPal instead.

best_practices: Always check eligibility before showing Venmo button
Provide PayPal as fallback when Venmo not available
Use presentation mode 'auto' for best mobile experience
Only offer Venmo for USD transactions
Test on both mobile and desktop
Handle Venmo app installation detection gracefully
Show clear messaging about regional restrictions
breaking_changes: Must create separate Venmo payment session (not same as PayPal)
Eligibility must be checked explicitly (not automatic)
onCancel takes NO parameters (v5: takes data parameter)
testing_requirements: Test with US-based test accounts only
Verify Venmo app flow on mobile devices
Test fallback to PayPal when Venmo unavailable
Verify error messages for non-US customers
